name: ai-slidev-dark-tech
description: Dark tech theme for developer presentations. Dark background with gradient accents.
style:
<style>
:root {
  --slidev-theme-primary: #3cffd0;
  --slidev-theme-secondary: #FFB800;
}

.slidev-layout {
  background: #1d1d1f;
  color: #ffffff;
}

.slidev-layout h1 {
  color: #3cffd0;
}

.slidev-layout h2 {
  color: #FFB800;
}

.slidev-layout code {
  background: rgba(60, 255, 208, 0.1);
  color: #3cffd0;
}
</style>
